Meet the Beasties

Eva Demsky

Pronouns: She/her

Year: 2022

Major(s) / minor(s): 21M-1 & 14-2 (double major)

Bio: Hi! My name is Eva. When I'm not doing schoolwork, I love singing, dancing, and acting. I'm a part of the MIT Musical Theatre Guild and the Asymptones a cappella group. I also love watching Friends, Seinfeld, and Steven Universe!

Javier

Year: 2024

Major(s) / minor(s): 6-3

Jessica

Year: 2024

kano

Pronouns: she/her

Year: 2025

Major(s) / minor(s): meche + political science/global studies

Bio: hi i'm kano! i like to make things, break things, and play with things. kurt vonnegut is my current fav author: cat's cradle and slaughterhouse-five are excellent books. i enjoy many many quotes, this week's notable one being "the same hot water that softens the potato also hardens the egg." this is my ig, where i'm most active: https://www.instagram.com/pakaprow. this is my twitter, where i'm most dangerous: https://twitter.com/bbywch. this is my facebook, where my parents follow me (and you know how that goes): https://www.facebook.com/kanotung. thank you.

Year: 2022

Major(s) / minor(s): 6-14

Major(s) / minor(s): 24-1 and Astronomy!

Bio: i love reading, chilling with my dog, and experiencing new things (especially ice cream flavors and nature)!

Bio: I love music, good food, and hanging out with the beasties!

rai

Year: 2025

Bio: resident party poster designer!! please share cursed photoshop ideas with me :​))

Teresa Gao

Pronouns: she/her

Year: 2023

Major(s) / minor(s): 6-3 + 9 (double)

Bio: I'm a violist who loves reading graphic novels and otherwise exploring the great indoors. I'm also the person who created this version of our Beast website! Feel free to say hi at t_gao [at] mit [dot] edu :​)
